strong_cointegration.description: Strong cointegration with fast mean reversion

weak_cointegration.description: Weak cointegration with slow mean reversion

regime_shifts.description: Cointegrated pair with regime shifts in the mean

structural_break.description: Pair with structural break in cointegration relationship

spurious_cointegration.description: Pair with spurious cointegration due to common trends

multivariate_cointegration.description: System with multiple cointegrating relationships for Johansen testing

borderline_cointegration.description: Borderline case that tests robustness of cointegration methods

drift_term.description: Cointegrated with drift term (model 1 in Johansen)

linear_trend.description: Cointegrated with linear trend (model 3-4 in Johansen)
